key_insight: In this report we demonstrate dense polycrystalline calcium hydroxide ceramics fabricated by hydrothermally-assisted sintering - often referred to as cold-sintering - to produce high-purity calcium hydroxide targets for calcium oxide thin film deposition.

paper_title: Hydrothermally-Assisted Sintering of Calcium Hydroxide Sputtering Targets: A Route to Quantum-Grade CaO Thin Films
